Description: Vendor-assigned country code for the issuer; join to a country mapping to obtain labels
Composite 1–100 percentile insider activity rank within the country peer group, combining NetBuyerRatioRank, PurchaseDepthRank, and SellingDepthRank; higher is more bullish
Composite 1–100 percentile insider activity rank within the TRBC industry peer group; higher is more bullish
1–100 percentile rank of the net buyer ratio among insiders (breadth of buyers vs. sellers); higher values indicate more net buying and a more bullish signal
1–100 percentile rank of the recency and magnitude of insider purchases; higher values indicate stronger, more recent buying and a more bullish signal
Composite 1–100 percentile insider activity rank within the TRBC sector peer group; higher is more bullish
1–100 percentile rank of insider selling depth for the company, oriented so higher values indicate less concerning selling and a more bullish signal
